seoTitle: Wilson Valley vs Wilsons Plains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wilson Valley and Wilsons Plains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wilson Valley vs Wilsons Plains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wilson Valley and Wilsons Plains.
heading: Wilson Valley vs Wilsons Plains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wilson Valley, Queensland and Wilsons Plains, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wilsons Plains has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Wilson Valley (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wilson Valley or Wilsons Plains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wilson Valley has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Wilsons Plains scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wilson Valley scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsons Plains scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wilson Valley or Wilsons Plains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wilsons Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
